summary: USCIS retweet of the White House's '365 Days of President Donald J. Trump' anniversary reel (identical media file). It is a vertical, social-media-native, music-driven hype montage with big animated kinetic-typography callouts: fast cuts of Trump before world flags ('STRONG GLOBAL RELATIONSHIPS'), color-graded Marines on razor wire, Trump in the Rose Garden, a White House event ('No Men In Women's SPORTS'), and a fireworks finale ('MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN'). Empty transcript and very high music score; the cinematic montage-trailer styling and youth-appeal spectacle put it squarely in scope, with a federal immigration agency (USCIS) amplifying it.

script.scene: Trump seated at a table in front of a row of world flags (German, Italian, Ukrainian, UK); large blue animated text overlay 'STRONG GLOBAL RELATIONSHIPS.' No talking (music-driven).
Cinematic, color-graded shot of US Marines in helmets/packs working a concertina-razor-wire obstacle in the dirt; gritty militaristic tone.
Trump in a long dark overcoat walking across a stage in the White House Rose Garden, flanked by American flags and tulips; polished slow-motion feel.
Interior White House hallway with chandelier and flags as a group walks toward camera down a red carpet; bold yellow animated text 'No Men In Women's SPORTS.'
Cinematic back-of-head shot of Trump and a woman watching a wall of fireworks/lights; centered serif text 'MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN' as the closing beat.

notable_text: On-screen kinetic text: 'STRONG GLOBAL RELATIONSHIPS', 'No Men In Women's SPORTS', 'MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN'. Tweet (RT @WhiteHouse): '365 DAYS OF PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP. A Golden Age just getting started.'
